accurate.why: accurate; parcel-to-county mapping and conveyance terms consistent with the Act

no_hallucinations.why: MOA/roles description reflects the Dingell Act process; not fabricated

changes_to_existing_law.why: directs conveyance of federal land; does not amend general statutory law (operates under existing authorities)

exceptions_conditions.why: notes management conditions and limits on future conveyances

major_provisions_covered.why: covers conveyance, management, consideration, costs, future-conveyance limits

correct_entities.why: Reclamation and counties correct; parcel names accurate

correct_figures.why: three-year deadline correct; no incorrect figures
